mapper.select: SELECT id, homework_id, student_id, submission_content, attachment_url, submission_time, score, feedback, graded_by, graded_time, status, created_time, updated_time FROM homework_submission WHERE homework_id = #{homeworkId} AND student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY submission_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT hs.id, hs.homework_id, h.homework_title, h.course_id, hs.student_id, hs.submission_content, hs.attachment_url, hs.submission_time, hs.score, hs.feedback, hs.graded_by, hs.graded_time, hs.status, h.total_score AS homework_total_score, hs.created_time FROM homework_submission hs INNER JOIN homework h ON h.id = hs.homework_id WHERE hs.id = #{submissionId}

SELECT hs.id, hs.homework_id, h.homework_title, h.course_id, hs.student_id, hs.attachment_url, hs.submission_time FROM homework_submission hs INNER JOIN homework h ON h.id = hs.homework_id WHERE hs.id = #{submissionId} LIMIT 1

SELECT hs.id, hs.homework_id, h.homework_title, h.course_id, hs.student_id, hs.attachment_url, hs.submission_time FROM homework_submission hs INNER JOIN homework h ON h.id = hs.homework_id WHERE hs.homework_id = #{homeworkId} AND hs.status != 'DRAFT' AND hs.attachment_url IS NOT NULL AND hs.attachment_url != '' ORDER BY hs.submission_time DESC, hs.id DESC

SELECT hs.id, hs.homework_id, h.homework_title, h.course_id, hs.student_id, hs.submission_content, hs.attachment_url, hs.submission_time, hs.score, hs.feedback, hs.graded_by, hs.graded_time, hs.status, h.total_score AS homework_total_score, hs.created_time FROM homework_submission hs INNER JOIN homework h ON h.id = hs.homework_id WHERE hs.id = #{submissionId} AND h.teacher_id = #{teacherId}

SELECT h.id AS homeworkId, h.homework_title AS homeworkTitle, CASE WHEN latest_hs.status IS NOT NULL THEN latest_hs.status WHEN h.deadline IS NOT NULL AND NOW() > h.deadline THEN 'OVERDUE_NOT_SUBMITTED' ELSE 'NOT_SUBMITTED' END AS status, latest_hs.score AS score FROM homework h LEFT JOIN ( SELECT hs.id, hs.homework_id, hs.status, hs.score FROM homework_submission hs INNER JOIN ( SELECT homework_id, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM homework_submission WHERE student_id = #{studentId} GROUP BY homework_id ) latest ON hs.id = latest.max_id ) latest_hs ON h.id = latest_hs.homework_id WHERE h.course_id = #{courseId} AND (h.status = 'PUBLISHED' OR h.status = 'CLOSED') ORDER BY h.deadline ASC, h.id ASC

SELECT h.id AS homeworkId, h.homework_title AS homeworkTitle, CASE WHEN latest_hs.status IS NOT NULL THEN latest_hs.status WHEN h.deadline IS NOT NULL AND NOW() > h.deadline THEN 'OVERDUE_NOT_SUBMITTED' ELSE 'NOT_SUBMITTED' END AS status, latest_hs.score AS score, latest_hs.submission_time AS submitTime FROM homework h LEFT JOIN ( SELECT hs.id, hs.homework_id, hs.status, hs.score, hs.submission_time FROM homework_submission hs INNER JOIN ( SELECT homework_id, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM homework_submission WHERE student_id = #{studentId} GROUP BY homework_id ) latest ON hs.id = latest.max_id ) latest_hs ON h.id = latest_hs.homework_id WHERE h.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY h.deadline ASC, h.id ASC

SELECT h.id AS homeworkId, h.homework_title AS homeworkTitle, COALESCE(sc.totalStudents, 0) AS totalStudents, COUNT(latest_hs.id) AS submittedCount, COALESCE(AVG(latest_hs.score), 0) AS averageScore, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN latest_hs.score IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS scoredCount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN latest_hs.status = 'LATE' THEN 1 WHEN h.deadline IS NOT NULL AND latest_hs.submission_time IS NOT NULL AND latest_hs.submission_time > h.deadline THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS lateCount FROM homework h LEFT JOIN ( SELECT hs.homework_id, hs.student_id, MAX(hs.id) AS max_id FROM homework_submission hs WHERE hs.status != 'DRAFT' GROUP BY hs.homework_id, hs.student_id ) latest ON latest.homework_id = h.id LEFT JOIN homework_submission latest_hs ON latest_hs.id = latest.max_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT course_id, COUNT(1) AS totalStudents FROM student_course WHERE learning_status != 'DROPPED' GROUP BY course_id ) sc ON sc.course_id = h.course_id WHERE h.course_id = #{courseId} GROUP BY h.id, h.homework_title, sc.totalStudents ORDER BY h.deadline ASC, h.id ASC

SELECT HOUR(latest_hs.submission_time) AS hour, COUNT(1) AS submissionCount FROM homework h INNER JOIN ( SELECT hs.homework_id, hs.student_id, MAX(hs.id) AS max_id FROM homework_submission hs WHERE hs.status != 'DRAFT' GROUP BY hs.homework_id, hs.student_id ) latest ON latest.homework_id = h.id INNER JOIN homework_submission latest_hs ON latest_hs.id = latest.max_id WHERE h.course_id = #{courseId} AND latest_hs.submission_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY HOUR(latest_hs.submission_time) ORDER BY hour ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE homework_submission hs INNER JOIN homework h ON hs.homework_id = h.id SET hs.status = 'LATE', hs.updated_time = NOW() WHERE hs.homework_id = #{homeworkId} AND hs.submission_time IS NOT NULL AND h.deadline IS NOT NULL AND hs.submission_time > h.deadline AND hs.status IN ('SUBMITTED', 'DRAFT')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalSubmissions, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN hs.score IS NOT NULL OR hs.status = 'GRADED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gradedCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN hs.status = 'LATE' THEN 1 WHEN h.deadline IS NOT NULL AND hs.submission_time IS NOT NULL AND hs.submission_time > h.deadline THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS lateCount, COALESCE(AVG(hs.score), 0) AS averageScore FROM homework_submission hs INNER JOIN homework h ON h.id = hs.homework_id WHERE hs.homework_id = #{homeworkId} AND hs.status != 'DRAFT'

SELECT CASE WHEN h.total_score IS NULL OR h.total_score = 0 THEN 'UNAVAILABLE' WHEN (hs.score / h.total_score * 100) < 60 THEN '0-59' WHEN (hs.score / h.total_score * 100) < 70 THEN '60-69' WHEN (hs.score / h.total_score * 100) < 80 THEN '70-79' WHEN (hs.score / h.total_score * 100) < 90 THEN '80-89' ELSE '90-100' END AS scoreRange, COUNT(1) AS scoreCount FROM homework_submission hs INNER JOIN homework h ON h.id = hs.homework_id WHERE hs.homework_id = #{homeworkId} AND hs.status != 'DRAFT' AND hs.score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY scoreRange
